scenes.narration: Moses was gone. The greatest leader Israel had ever known. And Joshua was next.
scenes.image_prompt: Young Joshua standing alone on a hilltop looking out at a vast unknown wilderness ahead, looking uncertain, colorful dramatic bible storybook illustration

scenes.narration: God spoke to Joshua directly. Three times He said the same thing. It must have been important.
scenes.image_prompt: Joshua kneeling as a glowing golden light speaks to him from above, eyes wide and listening, warm reverent colorful bible storybook illustration

scenes.narration: Be strong and courageous. Be strong and courageous. Be strong and courageous.
scenes.image_prompt: Joshua standing up straighter each time, growing in confidence, golden light growing brighter around him, colorful hopeful bible storybook illustration

scenes.narration: God wasn't saying — you have nothing to be afraid of. He was saying — be brave anyway.
scenes.image_prompt: Joshua looking at a dark and stormy path ahead, but stepping forward onto it with a determined expression, golden light behind him, colorful bible illustration

scenes.narration: Do not be afraid. Do not be discouraged. The Lord your God will be with you wherever you go.
scenes.image_prompt: Joshua walking confidently forward with a glowing presence beside him, the path ahead becoming brighter with each step, colorful hopeful storybook art

scenes.narration: Courage isn't the absence of fear. Courage is taking the next step even when your knees are shaking.
scenes.image_prompt: A child taking a brave step off a high diving board with a nervous but determined face, sun shining, colorful joyful storybook illustration

scenes.narration: Maybe you're facing something big right now. A new school. A hard season. An impossible decision.
scenes.image_prompt: Child standing before a large school building on the first day, nervous but standing tall, colorful warm encouragement bible storybook illustration

scenes.narration: The same God who told Joshua to be strong is telling you the same thing right now.
scenes.image_prompt: God's warm light shining down on a child, a gentle hand on their shoulder, peaceful and encouraging, warm colorful bible storybook art

scenes.narration: He is not sending you out alone. He goes before you. He walks beside you. He has your back.
scenes.image_prompt: Child walking forward confidently, glowing golden figures surrounding them on all sides, protecting and guiding, bright colorful hopeful illustration

scenes.narration: Be strong and courageous. That's not just a suggestion. That's a promise — that you won't face it alone.
scenes.image_prompt: Joshua standing at the front of a great crowd, staff raised, golden sunrise ahead, everyone ready to move forward together, bright triumphant colorful bible storybook art
